models.title: Model Preferences
models.description: Choose the AI model used for tabular reviews

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
dangerZone.confirm: Are you sure? This will permanently delete your account.

modelsPage.tabularReviewModelHint: We recommend using a smaller model for tabular reviews to reduce token costs.
modelsPage.apiKeysDescription: You must provide your own API keys for the app to work or add your API keys into the .env file if you are running your own instance of Mike.
modelsPage.apiKeysTitleHint: Title generation automatically routes to the cheapest configured provider model.
modelsPage.serverEnvKeyActive: Server .env key active — paste to override
modelsPage.serverEnvKeyConfigured: A server .env key is configured for this provider. You can override it by saving your own key below.
modelsPage.savedKeyReplace: A key is saved. Paste a new key to replace it.

mcp.title: MCP Server
mcp.description: Connect Mike to other AI tools using the Model Context Protocol. Issue a token below, paste it into your MCP client, and Mike's projects, documents, chats, and workflows become available there.
mcp.saveTokenWarning: Save this token now — it won't be shown again.
mcp.noTokens: No tokens yet. Issue one above to connect Mike to an MCP client.
mcp.revokeConfirm: Revoke this token? Any agent using it will be disconnected.
